---
title: "Appendix"
author: "Rhett D Harrison"
format:
        html:
                css: custom.css
        pdf: default
filters:
- collapse-output
editor: visual
---

## Appendix II - Community Forests Surveyed

### Community Forest Management in Zambia: Is It Working?

#### List of Community forests surveyed and the number of interviews conducted


```{r}
#| label: Load_data_and_libraries
#| include: false
#| #| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error:   false

library(tidyverse)
library(grid)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(scales)
library(broom.mixed)
library(modelsummary)
library(ggwordcloud)

load("cfmg.RData")
```



```{r}
#| label: tbl-support_organisations
#| code-fold: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error:   false
#| tbl-cap: "CFs surveyed"

cfmg |>
  group_by(province, cfmg_name) |>
  summarise(n_interviews = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(cfmg_name = str_to_sentence(cfmg_name)) |>
  arrange(province, cfmg_name) |>
  gt(groupname_col = "province") |>
  cols_label(
    cfmg_name    = "Community forest",
    n_interviews = "Interviews"
  ) |>
  cols_align(align = "left",   columns = cfmg_name) |>
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = n_interviews) |>
  summary_rows(
    groups  = everything(),
    columns = n_interviews,
    fns     = list(Total = ~sum(.)),
    fmt     = ~fmt_integer(.)
  )


```
